tweets.text: Build an agent once, then share it across teams...

tweets.author: @OpenAI
tweets.text: Workspace agents can work across tools - pulling context from docs, email, chats, code, and systems...

tweets.text: Agents are built to help with the kind of work that takes time, context, and follow-through...

tweets.author: @AnthropicAI
tweets.text: Last month, we published our look into what 81,000 people told us they want from AI...

tweets.author: @AnthropicAI
tweets.text: In the study, we find that respondents in both the highest- and the lowest-paid occupations report the largest productivity gains from AI...

tweets.author: @AnthropicAI
tweets.text: And those in occupations that show high Claude usage - like software engineering - were more worried about displacement than those in lower-exposure roles.

tweets.author: @AnthropicAI
tweets.text: To truly understand AI's economic impact, we'll need to collect much more qualitative data like this...
